name: Cream of Salsify and Mushroom Soup
recipeIngredient: 275 g Mushrooms (9 2/3 oz), cleaned and roughly chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Scrub the salsify thoroughly in plenty of water, discard any ends.
2. Cut the salsify into 1 cm (1/2 inch) lengths.
3. Heat the sunflower oil in a heavy, covered pan over medium heat.
4. Add the chopped onions and cook for 10 to 15 minutes until softened.
5. Stir occasionally to prevent sticking, as salsify is dry.
6. Meanwhile, heat olive oil in a separate pan and sauté the mushrooms until they release their liquid; set aside the liquid and add the mushrooms to the salsify and onions.
7. Add water and bring the mixture to a boil. Simmer for 20 minutes.
8. In a heavy pan, melt butter over medium heat.
9. Gradually stir in flour, then incorporate the mushroom-liquid mixture followed by the milk.
10. Cook until a thick sauce forms; gradually add the liquid from the soup.
11. Stir in the vegetables and any remaining liquid, adjusting seasoning with salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste.
